raw_source_by_year: All years: parsed constant per record (file year)

notes: Code 4 indicates foreign resident. Use to exclude foreign residents for residence-based totals.

raw_source_by_year: 1990-2002: always unrevised_1989; 2003-2013: uses presence of revision-specific fields (MEDUC and MRACE); 2014-2024: always revised_2003
derivation_rule: 1990-2002: unrevised_1989. 2003-2013: revised_2003 if MEDUC is nonblank; else unrevised_1989 if MRACE is nonblank; else unknown. 2014-2024: revised_2003
notes: Use to define revision-consistent analytic subsets, especially for variables that are revised-only in some years.
2003 is from MAGER41 recode (code 1→14; codes 2-41→N+13; 99/other→null).
9 indicates unknown/not stated.
9 indicates unknown/not stated.

1=married; 2=unmarried; 9=unknown/not stated. California stopped reporting marital status starting 2017: ~11-12% null from 2017 onward (0% null 1990-2016). Use marital_reporting_flag to identify non-reporting-state births.

True=state reports marital status to NCHS; False=non-reporting state (California from 2017+). Null for all pre-2014 years. Use to distinguish non-reporting-state births from genuine unknowns when marital_status is null.
0=non-Hispanic; 1-5 specific Hispanic origin; 9=unknown/not stated. Blanks can occur due to nonreporting.
Null when Hispanic origin is missing or unknown.

raw_source_by_year: 1990-2002: approximate bridge from MRACE@80-81; 2003-2013: MRACEREC@143; 2014-2019: MBRACE@110 (NCHS dropped MBRACE in 2020+)
notes: 1=White; 2=Black; 3=AIAN; 4=Asian/PI. 1990-2002 uses approximate crosswalk (not official NCHS bridged race). 100% NULL for 2020-2024 — NCHS discontinued the bridged-race recode; for 2020+ use maternal_race_ethnicity_5 (which is reconstructed from MRACE6).

raw_source_by_year: Derived from maternal_hispanic + maternal_race_bridged4 (1990-2019) or maternal_race_detail (2020+)
derivation_rule: if maternal_hispanic==true then 'Hispanic' else map bridged4 to NH_*; for 2020+ where bridged race is null: MRACE6 01→NH_white 02→NH_black 03→NH_aian 04/05→NH_asian_pi 06(multiracial)→null
notes: Null when Hispanic origin is missing/unknown or race is multiracial (MRACE6=06 for 2020+, ~3% of births). See race_bridge_method for derivation era.
Code frame differs across eras; do not treat as a single comparable series.
15=multiracial. Populated 2014+. NCHS does not expose MRACE15 in 2003-2013 public-use files — null for all 1990-2013 rows.

harmonized_label: Method used to derive bridged race / race-ethnicity
notes: approximate_pre2003 for 1990-2002 (crosswalk from MRACE detail); nchs_bridged for 2003-2019 (official NCHS MBRACE/MRACEREC); approximate_from_detail for 2020-2024 (reconstructed from MRACE6; multiracial code 06 → null race_ethnicity_5).

raw_source_by_year: 1990-2002: DMEDUC@83-84 (years→cat4); 2003-2008: MEDUC@155 (revised) and MEDUC_REC@158 (unrevised); 2009-2013: MEDUC@155 (revised; unrevised blank in public-use); 2014-2024: MEDUC@124
notes: Expect substantial missingness in 2009-2013 corresponding to unrevised areas. For revision-consistent analyses in 2009-2013, restrict to `certificate_revision == 'revised_2003'`.

raw_source_by_year: 1990-2002: MONPRE@106-107; 2003-2008: PRECARE@245-246 (revised) and MPCB@256-257 (unrevised); 2009-2013: PRECARE@245-246 (revised; MPCB blank in public-use); 2014-2024: PRECARE@224-225
derivation_rule: Prefer PRECARE when present else MPCB
notes: 00 indicates no prenatal care; 99 indicates unknown/not stated. Expect substantial missingness in 2009-2013.

derivation_rule: none if month==0; 1st if 1-3; 2nd if 4-6; 3rd if 7-10; unknown if month==99 or null

notes: 99 indicates unknown/not stated. Cap differs by era (49 for 1990-2013; 98 for 2014+).
1990-2002 uses independent source field; 2003+ derives from intensity. 2009-2013 revised-only.
2009-2013 revised-only.
Not directly comparable to pregnancy smoking measures in earlier years.

raw_source_by_year: 1990-2002: DIABETES@228; 2003-2015: URF_DIAB@331 (2003-2013) or URF_DIAB@1331 (2014-2015); 2016-2024: derived from RF_PDIAB@313 OR RF_GDIAB@314 (the URF_* tail block is filler in 2016+ User Guides)
derivation_rule: 2016+: 1 if either RF_PDIAB or RF_GDIAB is Y; 2 if both are N; null otherwise
notes: 1=yes; 2=no; 8=factor not on certificate (2000-2003 only, ~5-6k rows/year, per Nat200Xdoc.pdf p.46); 9=unknown/not classifiable. Source-field decision is per-year (not per-batch). Prefer diabetes_any_bool (derived) which maps 8 and 9 → null.
1=yes; 2=no; 8=factor not on certificate (2000-2003 only, per Nat200Xdoc.pdf p.46); 9=unknown/not classifiable. Prefer hypertension_chronic_bool (derived) which maps 8 and 9 → null.
1=yes; 2=no; 8=factor not on certificate (2000-2003 only, per Nat200Xdoc.pdf p.46); 9=unknown/not classifiable. Prefer hypertension_gestational_bool (derived) which maps 8 and 9 → null.
99 indicates unknown/not stated. Series breaks at 2003 and 2014 transitions.

raw_source_by_year: Derived from year and available fields
derivation_rule: lmp for 1990-2002; combined for 2003-2013; obstetric_estimate for 2014-2024

notes: 1=under 37 weeks; 2=37+; 3=not stated.
9999 indicates not stated.

raw_source_by_year: 1990-2002: DELMETH5@224 (code 5→9); 2003-2004: DMETH_REC@401 (codes ≥5 remapped to 9 to align with DELMETH5 not-stated sentinel); 2005-2013: DMETH_REC@403; 2014-2024: DMETH_REC@408
notes: Two coding frames with boundary at 2005 (NOT 2003). Cesarean binary crosswalk: codes 3+4 pre-2005, code 2 post-2005; validated against NVSR 1990-2024 cesarean rates (all within 0.07 pct-pts). See docs/FAQ.md ('How do I compute the cesarean rate across 1990-2024?') for the canonical recipe. Invariant delivery_method_recode_post2004_out_of_set enforces {1,2,9} for 2005+.
99 indicates unknown/not stated.
Sentinel 99.9→null. Null for all years before 2014. Available only on revised 2003 certificate.

1=Underweight (<18.5); 2=Normal (18.5-24.9); 3=Overweight (25.0-29.9); 4=Obesity I (30.0-34.9); 5=Obesity II (35.0-39.9); 6=Extreme Obesity III (>=40.0). Sentinel 9→null. Null for all years before 2014.

raw_source_by_year: 1990-2002: DFAGE@154-155; 2003-2011: UFAGECOMB@184-185; 2012-2013: FAGECOMB@182-183 (NCHS moved the field here from UFAGECOMB; populated for revised-cert rows only — ~77-79%); 2014-2024: FAGECOMB@147-148
derivation_rule: Prefer FAGECOMB (revised-cert raw age) when non-null, else UFAGECOMB
notes: 99→null; range-clipped to 9-98. For categorical (5-year-bucket) father age that also covers unrevised-cert 2005-2013 rows, see father_age_cat_from_rec11.

harmonized_label: Father age category from FAGEREC11 recode
notes: Recovers categorical father age for 2012 where raw single-year age is blank. Null for 1990-2002 and 2014+.
Coarse 4-category harmonization across eras.

raw_source_by_year: 1990-2002: BIRATTND@10; 2003: ATTEND@408; 2004: ATTEND@408 (layout identical to 2003 for this field, despite the 2004 file sharing the 2005 record length); 2005-2013: ATTEND@410; 2014-2024: ATTEND@433
notes: 1=MD; 2=DO; 3=CNM; 4=other midwife; 5=other; 9→null.

1=Medicaid; 2=Private insurance; 3=Self-pay; 4=Other. 9→null. Null for 2005-2008 (filler). Partial coverage 2009-2010 (2003-revision states) in V2 natality. Full coverage 2014+. **V3 LINKED CAVEAT**: 100% NULL for 2009-2010 in V3 (the 2009 and 2010 LinkCO denominator-plus zips ship with byte 413 blank across the entire file — upstream NCHS limitation, not a parser bug).
